_comment: Opportunity: Tribulation Aftermath. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 0 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Core Formation), perception (Nascent Soul (to perceive the residual energy)), and luck (modifier 1.2). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Tribulation Aftermath
description: The site of a recent heavenly tribulation, saturated with residual lightning. Exists because: tribulations leave residual energy.
perception_required: Nascent Soul (to perceive the residual energy)
why_untaken: Site is dangerous; residual lightning can kill.
natural_next_event: Residual energy disperses; site returns to normal.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
